description: This photograph depicts an agricultural landscape under a clear blue sky. The foreground is dominated by a field of dense, bright yellow flowering plants, likely a crop such as rapeseed. In the mid-ground, a distinct, continuous line of tall green deciduous trees stretches horizontally across the image, appearing as a natural barrier or windbreak. This linear feature of trees exemplifies the "Lines of trees and scrub" land cover class (EUNIS G5.1), often found within agricultural or cultivated land environments as defined in Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) guidelines. Partially obscured, unreadable text is visible in the bottom-left corner, starting with "www.e".
